headline: Hormel Foods (HRL) Reports Next Week: What to Expect
summary: Hormel (HRL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Equal-Weight on Hormel Foods, Lowers Price Target to $22
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Pooran Sharma   maintains Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $27 to $22.
